title: SDK Specs
description: Catalog of top-level specs from launchdarkly/sdk-specs.

source_commit.description: git rev-parse HEAD of the sdk-specs repo at generation time.

specs.description: Map of top-level spec id to spec metadata.

status.description: Spec status. Common values are DRAFT, ACCEPTED, DEPRECATED, SUPERSEDED, APPROVED, CURRENT — but specs in the wild use additional tokens (and version-prefixed tokens are normalized to the highest version) so this is intentionally a free string.

path.description: Path to the top-level spec directory, relative to the sdk-specs repo root.

readme_path.description: Path to the README that was parsed for this spec.

latest_version.description: Highest versioned subdirectory (e.g. 'v1.0', 'v4.0'), or null if the spec is not versioned.

versions.description: All versioned subdirectories of the spec, sorted lexicographically.

sub_specs.description: Nested sub-spec ids that live underneath this top-level spec.

requirement_count.description: Total count of '### Requirement' and '#### Conditional Requirement' headings across this spec, its versions, and its sub-specs.
